context: Tests that the agent identifies the missing .PHONY declarations and tab-vs-space indentation issues, fixes them in the corrected Makefile, and explains why both matter.

checklist.name: .PHONY declared
checklist.description: The corrected Makefile includes a .PHONY declaration listing the non-file targets (all, build, test, clean, lint, install, or subset thereof)

checklist.name: .PHONY issue explained
checklist.description: audit-notes.md explains that without .PHONY, a file named 'clean' (or similar) would cause Make to silently skip the target

checklist.name: Tab indentation in recipes
checklist.description: The corrected Makefile uses hard tab characters (not spaces) at the start of recipe lines

checklist.name: Tab issue explained
checklist.description: audit-notes.md explains that spaces instead of tabs cause 'missing separator' errors in GNU Make

checklist.name: rm unquoted variable noted
checklist.description: audit-notes.md identifies or the corrected Makefile quotes the $(VENV) variable in the rm -rf command (e.g., rm -rf "$(VENV)")

checklist.name: All non-file targets covered
checklist.description: The .PHONY declaration includes at least 'clean' and 'test' (the two targets most likely to conflict with filesystem names)

checklist.name: Validation approach mentioned
checklist.description: audit-notes.md or the agent output references using make -n or a validation tool to detect the issues
